card.title: Testosterone Replacement Therapy
card.description: Our TRT program provides comprehensive, ongoing care, including testosterone cypionate prescriptions delivered to your door, visits with licensed clinicians, quarterly hormone labs, and personalized 1:1 support to optimize your health and performance.
card.description2: Monthly subscription starts from just $99 and includes all medications, clinician consults and follow-up labs. No hidden fees. Easy cancellations.
card.finePrint: Our drugs may include compounded products that have not been approved by the FDA. The FDA does not verify the safety or effectiveness of compounded dr...

benefits.title: Elevate Mood & Libido
benefits.description: Helps restore mood, energy, and sexual wellness in individuals with low testosterone.

benefits.title: Support Physical Vitality
benefits.description: May support physical function and recovery in men with clinically diagnosed testosterone deficiency.

benefits.title: Promote Long-Term Health
benefits.description: May support metabolic efficiency and cognitive health in men with confirmed low testosterone levels.

quotes.quote: “Blokes has helped me with my energy levels and get back to feeling like my old self. I feel how I did in my twenties, and my wife loves my increased libido. I will be staying with Blokes, and I appreciate all the service they provide.”
quotes.author: Tony Whiting

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is the pricing?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: What are symptoms of low testosterone?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: What can I expect on TRT?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: My testosterone level is 350, and my primary care provider said it's ‘normal,’ but I still have symptoms. Am I a candidate for TRT?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: What can I expect from Blokes?
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.

items.question: Are injections my only option for treating low testosterone?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: How often do I do labs and clinician follow-ups?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: What states can you NOT ship testosterone to?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
